title: Odense, Southern Denmark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Odense, Southern Denmark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Odense is a city in Southern Denmark with a population of 178,000. The birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, a charming city on the island of Funen with cobblestone streets and fairy-tale atmosphere.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
